name: Dilled Pasta Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta according to package instructions until al dente.
2. Drain and rinse the pasta in cold water.
3. In a large bowl, combine cooked pasta with chopped fresh herbs (e.g., parsley, basil).
4. Whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, minced garlic, dried oregano, salt, and pepper to create dressing.
5. Pour dressing over pasta and gently toss until evenly coated.
6. Cover the salad and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes before serving.
